SeekBarPreference.android:title: Trailing Silence (ms)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Time to wait after speech ends before triggering Smart Turn

SeekBarPreference.android:title: VAD Sensitivity (%)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Lower values make speech detection more sensitive

SeekBarPreference.android:title: EOT Threshold (%)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Probability threshold to determine turn completion

ListPreference.android:title: Max Analysis Window
ListPreference.android:summary: Maximum audio duration used for context

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Maintain Audio Context
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Keep audio context if turn is not complete (Sliding window)

ListPreference.android:title: Inference Mode
ListPreference.android:summary: Switch between C++ Native and Optimized Kotlin

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Results Display Time (ms)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How long to show the analysis result on screen
